title: 'Elyada` #0450
definition:
Eliadah or Eliada = "God knows"

 1) a son of David
 2) a Benjamite warrior chief
 3) an Aramean, the father of an enemy of Solomon
nasbUsage:
Definition: Eliadah or Eliada = "God knows"

 1) a son of David
 2) a Benjamite warrior chief
 3) an Aramean, the father of an enemy of Solomon

    NASB:  God knows, three Isr.
